'''Kaell 116''' was the leader of [[Dorsk 81]]'s home [[City/Legends|city]] at the time he returned from the [[Jedi Praxeum]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. His line had been running the city's politics for decades.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
